items.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: 5-Star Texas CB John Meredith III Reclassifies
items.summary: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Livingstone's all-round efforts in vain as Super Giants triumph at Lord's
items.summary: London Spirit captain took 2 for 14 and struck 69 but his side fell seven short of their target

items.title: Defoe leaves Woking after 'eye-opening' first managerial role
items.summary: Former England and Tottenham striker Jermain Defoe has described his first managerial job as an "eye-opening experience" following his departure from National League side Woking...
